mapper.select: SELECT /* RateAddMapper.selectRequestreviewTotalCnt 요금제 부가서비스 사용후기 목록 COUNT */ COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM A.MCP_REQUEST_REVIEW A WHERE 1=1 AND A.RATE_CD = #{rateAdsvcGdncSeq}

SELECT /* RateAddMapper.selectRequestreviewList 요금제 부가서비스 사용후기 목록 조회 */ A.REQUEST_KEY , A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.REQ_BUY_TYPE , A.MODEL_ID , A.PROD_ID , A.REVIEW_SBST , A.COMMEND_YN , A.EVENT_CD , (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID='ReviewEventInfo' AND DTL_CD=A.EVENT_CD) AS EVENT_NM , A.SNS_INFO , A.NTF_YN , A.PRIZE_SBST , A.STTUS_VAL , A.RIP , A.SYS_RDATE , A.SYS_RDATE_DD , A.REG_NM , DECODE(REQ_BUY_TYPE,'UU','유심 후기','MM','휴대폰 후기','-') AS REQ_BUY_TYPE_NM FROM MCP_REQUEST_REVIEW A WHERE 1=1 AND A.RATE_CD = #{rateAdsvcGdncSeq} ORDER BY A.NTF_YN DESC, A.SYS_RDATE DESC

SELECT /* RateAddMapper.selectRateAgreeView 약정할인 프로그램 및 할인반환금 안내 조회 */ CD_GROUP_ID1 , CD_GROUP_ID2 , DOC_VER , DOC_CONTENT , USE_YN , CRET_ID , CRET_DT , AMD_ID , AMD_DT FROM NMCP_FORM_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID1 = 'INFO' AND CD_GROUP_ID2 = 'RATEAGREE' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND DOC_TYPE = '01'

SELECT /* RateAddMapper.getRateAdsvcBnfitGdncDtlList 요금제부가서비스혜택안내 목록 조회 */ RATE_ADSVC_BNFIT_SEQ , RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ , RATE_ADSVC_BNFIT_ITEM_CD , SORT_ODRG , RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_IMG_NM , RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_NM , RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_DESC , RATE_ADSVC_ITEM_APD_DESC , USE_YN , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PSTNG_START_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PSTNG_START_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PSTNG_END_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PSTNG_END_DATE FROM NMCP_RATE_ADSVC_BNFIT_GDNC_DTL WHERE 1=1 AND RATE_ADSVC_GDNC_SEQ = #{rateAdsvcGdncSeq} ORDER BY TO_NUMBER(SORT_ODRG) ASC
